sentences.arabic: يَعْتَبِرُ الْعَرَبُ الْقِصَصَ جُزْءًا مِن ثَقَافَتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Arapi smatraju priče dijelom svoje kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs consider stories a part of their culture.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَدُّ يَحْكِي لِلْأَطْفَالِ حِكَايَاتٍ عَنِ الشَّجَاعَةِ وَالْكَرَمِ.
sentences.translation: Djed je djeci pričao priče o hrabrosti i plemenitosti.
sentences.translationEn: The grandfather used to tell the children tales of courage and generosity.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْقِصَصُ تُعَلِّمُ الصِّغَارَ الْقِيَمَ الْحَسَنَةَ.
sentences.translation: Ove priče uče mališane dobrim vrijednostima.
sentences.translationEn: These stories teach the young ones good values.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمِعُ الْجَمِيعُ بِاهْتِمَامٍ كَبِيرٍ إِلَى هَذِهِ الْمُغَامَرَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Svi sa velikim zanimanjem slušaju ove avanture.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone listens with great interest to these adventures.

sentences.arabic: الْقِصَّةُ الْجَيِّدَةُ تَبْقَى فِي الذَّاكِرَةِ لِوَقْتٍ طَوِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Dobra priča ostaje u sjećanju dugo vremena.
sentences.translationEn: A good story stays in the memory for a long time.
